evals.prompt: I just cloned the tesseract.NET repo at /c/Users/DeathBox/Desktop/coding/tesseract and want to build the library targeting netstandard2.0 in Debug mode. What command do I run?
evals.expected_output: Provide the correct dotnet build command with all relevant flags

evals.prompt: I keep getting DllNotFoundException for tesseract50.dll when I run my app. How do I debug this? I need to know where the library loader looks for DLLs.
evals.expected_output: Explain the LibraryLoader search path order, check DLL bitness matches process, and verify DLLs exist in output with CopyToOutputDirectory=PreserveNewest

evals.prompt: I need to extract text and confidence scores word-by-word from an image using the Tesseract.NET wrapper. Write me a C# code snippet.
evals.expected_output: Provide correct code using TesseractEngine, Pix.LoadFromFile, page.GetIterator(), iterating with PageIteratorLevel.Word and using GetText/GetConfidence/TryGetBoundingBox

evals.prompt: I just installed Tesseract.NET via NuGet but the engine throws an exception 'Failed to initialise tesseract engine'. I have the eng.traineddata in my project output. What else could be wrong?
evals.expected_output: Check datapath accuracy, engine mode vs traineddata compatibility, process bitness vs DLL bitness, and try EngineMode.TesseractOnly for legacy data
